meta.title: A Deep Dive Into The DDS Protocol   Ta Lun Yen
meta.description:
We like to include a couple of new, how to break this, sessions on the S4 Stage 2 agenda (even though all three days could be filled with these). 

At S4x22, Ta-Lun Yen went after the DDS protocol and showed how to break six implementations and the protocol specification itself.
